mnemonics.title: Project Phases - IPEMCC
mnemonics.content:
I - Initiation
P - Planning
E - Execution
M - Monitoring & Control
C - Closure

Remember: 'I Plan Every Move Carefully'

mnemonics.title: PMBOK Areas - ISSCCRRPSS
mnemonics.content:
I - Integration
S - Scope
S - Schedule
C - Cost
C - Communications (swap with Quality)
Q - Quality
R - Resource
R - Risk
P - Procurement
